system.description: The user of this potion is filled with invincible confidence and perfect self-assurance for the rest of the scene, fighting as calmly in bloody battle as if on a sparring field. When they attack, they roll a skill check instead of an attack roll, at a difficulty equal to half the target’s Armor Class, rounded down. They are also immune to any mental effect that would alter their emotions. While under the potion’s influence, however, the GM keeps track of their hit points and damage taken, and the player is told only when they hit zero.
